siteUrl.description: The site URL as defined in Search Console. Example: sc-domain:example.com (for domain resources) or http://www.example.com/ (for site prefix resources)

dimensions.description: Comma-separated list of dimensions to break down results by, such as query, page, country, device, date, searchAppearance

type.description: Type of search to filter by, such as web, image, video, news

aggregationType.description: Type of aggregation, such as auto, byNewsShowcasePanel, byProperty, byPage

rowLimit.description: Maximum number of rows to return (up to 25,000 for enhanced performance)

pageFilter.description: Filter by a specific page URL. Use with filterOperator.

queryFilter.description: Filter by a specific query string. Use with filterOperator.

countryFilter.description: Filter by a country using ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code (e.g., USA, CHN).

filterOperator.description: Operator for page and query filters. Defaults to "equals". Enhanced with regex support.

regexFilter.description: Advanced regex filter for intelligent query matching

minImpressions.description: Minimum impressions threshold for quick wins

maxCtr.description: Maximum CTR percentage for quick wins detection

quickWinsThresholds.description: Custom thresholds for quick wins detection

tools.name: mcp__plugin_seo_google-search-console__get_sitemap
tools.description: Get a sitemap for a site in Google Search Console

feedpath.description: The URL of the actual sitemap. For example: http://www.example.com/sitemap.xml

siteUrl.description: The site's URL, including protocol. For example: http://www.example.com/

tools.name: mcp__plugin_seo_google-search-console__index_inspect
tools.description: Inspect a URL to see if it is indexed or can be indexed

siteUrl.description: The site URL as defined in Search Console. Example: sc-domain:example.com (for domain resources) or http://www.example.com/ (for site prefix resources)

inspectionUrl.description: The fully-qualified URL to inspect. Must be under the property specified in "siteUrl"

languageCode.description: An IETF BCP-47 language code representing the language of the requested translated issue messages, such as "en-US" or "de-CH". Default is "en-US"

tools.name: mcp__plugin_seo_google-search-console__list_sitemaps
tools.description: List sitemaps for a site in Google Search Console

sitemapIndex.description: A URL of a site's sitemap index. For example: http://www.example.com/sitemapindex.xml

siteUrl.description: The site's URL, including protocol. For example: http://www.example.com/

tools.name: mcp__plugin_seo_google-search-console__list_sites
tools.description: List all sites in Google Search Console

tools.name: advisor
tools.description: Consult a stronger advisor model for strategic guidance on complex decisions. Call this tool when: (a) facing an architectural or design decision with multiple valid approaches, (b) stuck after 2+ failed attempts, (c) about to make an irreversible change, or (d) when you believe the task is complete and want verification. Takes no arguments; the advisor will read the full conversation history.
